zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Scott於1459年出生在英國肯特斯可也斯 霍爾時，他的父親William John Scott36歲，母親Agnes Beaufitz32歲。他於1476年與Sybil Lewknor在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1516年在英國英格蘭肯特被列為high sheriff of kent。他去世於1524年8月24日在英國肯特布拉布恩享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特 阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Scott于1459年出生在英国肯特斯可也斯 霍爾时，他的父亲William John Scott36岁，母亲Agnes Beaufitz32岁。他于1476年与Sybil Lewknor在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1516年在英国英格兰肯特被列为high sheriff of kent。他去世于1524年8月24日在英国肯特布拉布恩享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特 阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Scott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (Down): habitational and ethnic name from Middle English Scot ‘man from Scotland’. There is no evidence that the surname denoted either of the earlier senses of Scot as ‘(Gaelic-speaking) Irishman’ or ‘man from Alba’, the Gaelic-speaking region of Scotland north of the river Forth. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English and Scottish: from the rare Middle English personal name Scot (Old English Scott, possibly also Old Norse Skotr), only certainly attested in northern England.

variants.name: Scutt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Pierre.
English: nickname for a short person, from Middle English scut(e) ‘short’, or else for a swift runner, from Middle English scut ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Scott was born in 1459, in Scot's Hall, Kent, England, his father, William John Scott, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Beaufitz, was 32. He married Sybil Lewknor in 1476, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1516, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of kent in Kent, England, United Kingdom. He died on 24 August 1524, in Brabourne, Kent, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in East Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Scott est né en 1459, à Scot's Hall, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William John Scott, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Beaufitz, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Sybil Lewknor en 1476, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1516, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of kent à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 24 août 1524, à Brabourne, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à East Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Brabourne Church, East Ashford, Kent, En: East Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Scott 1459 in Scot's Hall, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William John Scott 36 und seine Mutter Agnes Beaufitz 32. Er hat 1476 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Sybil Lewknor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1516, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high sheriff of kent in Kent, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. August 1524 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Brabourne, Kent, England und wurde in East Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Scott è nato il nel 1459 nel Scot's Hall, Kent, England, il suo padre, William John Scott, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Beaufitz, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Sybil Lewknor nel 1476, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1516, all'età di 57 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of kent nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 24 agosto 1524, nel Brabourne, Kent, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a East Ashford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Scottが1459年にイギリスケントスコト'ス ハルで生まれた時，父William John Scottは36歳，母Agnes Beaufitzは32歳であった。1476年にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでSybil Lewknorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1516年，57歳の時，イギリスイギリスケントでの職業はhigh sheriff of kentと記録されている。彼は1524年8月24日にイギリスケントブラボウルンで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントエアスト アシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Scott(이)가 1459년 영국 켄트 스컷'스 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William John Scott(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Beaufitz(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1476년 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Sybil Lewknor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1516년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 high sheriff of kent이었다. 그는 1524년 8월 24일 영국 켄트 브라보우른에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Scott nasceu em 1459, em Scot's Hall, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William John Scott, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Beaufitz, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil Lewknor em 1476, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1516, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of kent em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1524, em Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em East Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Scott родился в 1459 г. в местности скот'с холл, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William John Scott было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Beaufitz, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil Lewknor в 1476 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1516 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии high sheriff of kent в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 24 августа 1524 г. в местности брабурн, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Scott nació en 1459, en Scot's Hall, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William John Scott, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes Beaufitz, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sybil Lewknor en 1476, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1516, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of kent en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1524, en Brabourne, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en East Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
